title: AutoEat
description: Automatically eats when your hunger drops so you can focus on your adventure.
body:
![AutoEat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be276fc05fb859aacc8f45667f412ce2a78f553d.png)

# AutoEat - Stay full, stay alive!

**AutoEat** automatically eats for you when your hunger drops, so you can keep mining, fighting, and building without interruptions.  

Supports **Fabric**, **Forge**, **Quilt**, and **NeoForge**, with updates for newer Minecraft versions.

## ✨ Features
- **Smart auto-eat** – configurable hunger threshold or "eat until full"
- **Panic mode** – prioritizes premium food when your health is low
- **Pause on hit** – optionally stop eating when damaged, with cooldown
- **Force-place support** – place blocks mid-eat, AutoEat resumes after a short cooldown
- **Offhand support** – optionally use offhand first, compatible with fishing rods
- **Food priority** – per-food allow/block list with search, filters (Danger, Super, Normal), and mass toggle
- **Clean UI** – toggle key (`H`), settings menu (`J`), advanced settings sliders, and optional toast notifications
- **Client-side only** – no server installation required
- And More

## 🔧 Requirements
- **Minecraft**: Supported versions are listed in each release
- **Loaders**:
  - Fabric Loader (requires Fabric API)
  - Quilt *(planned)*
  - Forge 
  - NeoForge 
- **Java**: 17 & 21+

## 📖 Usage
1. Press `J` to open settings and configure thresholds, panic health, and per-food blacklist.
2. Toggle AutoEat on/off with `H` (toast notification optional).
3. Enjoy uninterrupted adventures!
